web_data.description: Sugarfit is a healthtech startup dedicated to helping individuals reverse and manage diabetes through a science-backed, personalized approach. Their program integrates continuous glucose monitoring (CGM), personalized diet plans, fitness coaching, and expert consultations to improve health outcomes and reduce reliance on medication. They aim to empower users to take control of their health through data-driven insights and lifestyle changes.
web_data.industry: Healthtech, Digital Health, Diabetes Management, Wellness & Fitness
products_services: Personalized diabetes reversal and management programs
